name: dart
description: A command-line utility for Dart development

subcommands.name: analyze
subcommands.description: Analyze Dart code in a directory

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: --fatal-infos
options.description: Treat info level issues as fatal

name: --fatal-warnings
options.description: Treat warning level issues as fatal (defaults to on)

name: --no-fatal-warnings
options.description: Do not treat warning level issues as fatal (defaults to on)

args.name: directory
args.description: Dart project directory to analyze

subcommands.name: compile
subcommands.description: Compile Dart to various formats

subcommands.name: aot-snapshot
subcommands.description: Compile Dart to an AOT snapshot

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: -o
--output
options.description: Write the output to <file-name>

name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the compilation

suggestions.name: info
suggestions.description: Show error, warning, and info messages

suggestions.name: warning
suggestions.description: Show only error and warning messages

name: -D
--define
options.description: Define an environment declaration. To specify multiple declarations, use multiple options or use commas to separate key-value pairs. For example: dart compile aot-snapshot -D a=1,b=2 main.dart

args.name: key-value-pairs
args.description: Key-value pairs to define in Dart script

name: --enable-asserts
options.description: Enable assert statements

name: -p
--packages
options.description: Get package locations from the specified file instead of .packages. <path> can be relative or absolute

args.name: args-path
args.description: The path to draw packages from

name: --no-sound-null-safety
--sound-null-safety
options.description: Respect the nullability of types at runtime

name: -S
--save-debugging-info
options.description: Remove debugging information from the output and save it separately to the specified file.. <path> can be relative or absolute

args.name: debug-info-path
args.description: The path to write debugging info to

args.name: dart-entry-point
args.description: The Dart file containing the main function

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create a new Dart project

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: -t
--template
options.description: The project template to use

suggestions.name: package
suggestions.description: A starting point for Dart libraries or applications

suggestions.name: server-shelf
suggestions.description: A web server built using package:shelf

suggestions.name: web
suggestions.description: A web app that uses only core Dart libraries

name: --pub
options.description: Run 'pub get' after the project has been created. Default to on

name: --no-pub
options.description: Do not run 'pub get' after the project has been created. Default to on

name: --force
options.description: Force project generation, even if the target directory already exists

subcommands.name: fix
subcommands.description: Apply automated fixes to Dart source code

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: Preview the proposed changes but make no changes

name: --apply
options.description: Apply the proposed changes

subcommands.name: format
subcommands.description: Idiomatically format Dart source code

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Show all options and flags with --help

name: -o
--output
options.description: Set where to write formatted output

args.name: json
args.description: Print code and selection as JSON

args.name: none
args.description: Discard output

args.name: show
args.description: Print code to terminal

args.name: write
args.description: Overwrite formatted files on disk

args.name: --show
args.description: Set which filenames to print

suggestions.name: changed
suggestions.description: Nly the names of files whose formatting is changed

args.name: --summary
args.description: Show the specified summary after formatting

suggestions.name: profile
suggestions.description: How long it took to format each file

name: --set-exit-if-changed
options.description: Return exist code 1 if there are any formatting changes

name: --fix
options.description: Apply all style fixes

name: --fix-doc-comments
options.description: Use triple slash for documentation comments

name: --fix-function-typedefs
options.description: Use new syntax for function type typedefs

name: --fix-named-default-separator
options.description: Use '=' as the separator before named parameter default values

name: --fix-optional-const
options.description: Remove 'const' keyword inside constant context

name: --fix-optional-new
options.description: Remove 'new' keyword

name: --fix-single-cascade-statements
options.description: Remove unnecessary single cascades from expression statements

name: -l
--line-length
options.description: Wrap lines longer than this. Defaults to 80

args.name: line-length
args.description: Line length to wrap

name: -i
--indent
options.description: Add this many spaces of leading indentation

name: --follow-links
options.description: Follow links to files and directories. If unset, links will be ignored

name: --version
options.description: Show dart_style version

name: --selection
options.description: Track selection (given as 'start:length') through formatting

name: --stdin-name
options.description: Use this path in error messages when input is read from stdin. (defaults to 'stdin')

args.name: files-or-directory
args.description: The files or directories to format

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Perform null safety migration on a project

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Show additional command output

name: --apply-changes
options.description: Apply the proposed null safety changes to the files on disk

name: --ignore-errors
options.description: Attempt to perform null safety analysis even if the project has analysis errors

name: --skip-import-check
options.description: Go ahead with migration even if some imported files have not yet been migrated

name: --web-preview
options.description: Show and interactive preview of the proposed null safety changes in a browser window. (defaults to on)

name: --no-web-preview
options.description: Do not show and interactive preview of the proposed null safety changes in a browser window. (defaults to off)

name: --preview-hostname
options.description: Run the preview server on the specified hostname. If not specified, 'localhost' is used. Use 'any' to specify IPv6.any or IPv4.any. (defaults to the 'localhost')

name: --preview-port
options.description: Run the preview server on the specified port. If not specified, dynamically allocate a port

name: --summary
options.description: Output a machine-readable summary of migration changes

name: --ignore-exceptions
options.description: Attempt to perform null safety analysis even if exceptions occur

name: --sdk-path
options.description: The path to the Dart SDK

subcommands.name: outdated
subcommands.description: Analyze dependencies to find which ones can be upgraded

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: --color
options.description: Color the the output. Defaults to color when connected to a terminal, and no-color otherwise

name: --no-color
options.description: Do not color the output. Defaults to color when connected to a terminal, and no-color otherwise

name: --dependency-overrides
options.description: Show resolutions with 'dependency_overrides'. (defaults to on)

name: --no-dependency-overrides
options.description: Do not show resolutions with 'dependency_overrides'. (defaults to on)

name: --json
options.description: Output the results sing a JSON format

name: --mode
options.description: Highlight versions with PROPERTY. Only packages missing the PROPERTY will be included unless --show-all

name: --prereleases
options.description: Include prereleases in latest version. (defaults to on in --mode=null-safety)

name: --no-prereleases
options.description: Do not include prereleases in latest version. (defaults to off in --mode=null-safety)

name: --show-all
options.description: Include dependencies that are already fulfilling --mode

name: --no-show-all
options.description: Do not include dependencies that are already fulfilling --mode

name: --transitive
--no-transitive
options.description: Show transitive dependencies. (defaults to off in --mode=null-safety

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run a Dart program

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print this usage information

name: --observe
options.description: The observe flag is a convenience flag used to run a program with a set of common options. Useful for debugging

args.name: port-or-address
args.description: Port to observe

name: --enable-vm-service
options.description: Enables the VM service and listens on the specified port for connections (default port number is 8181, default dind address is localhost)

args.name: port-or-address
args.description: Port to observe

name: --pause-isolates-on-exit
--no-pause-isolates-on-exit
options.description: Pause isolates on exit when running with --enable-vm-service

name: --pause-isolates-on-unhandled-exceptions
options.description: Pause isolates when an unhandled exception is encountered when running with --enable-vm-service

name: --no-pause-isolates-on-unhandled-exceptions
options.description: Do not pause isolates when an unhandled exception is encountered when running with --enable-vm-service

name: --warn-on-pause-with-no-debugger
options.description: Print a warning when an isolate pauses with no attahed debugger when running with --enable-vm-service

name: --no-warn-on-pause-with-no-debugger
options.description: Do not print a warning when an isolate pauses with no attahed debugger when running with --enable-vm-service

name: --pause-isolates-on-start
options.description: Pause isolates on start when running with --enable-vm-service

name: --no-pause-isolates-on-start
options.description: Do not pause isolates on start when running with --enable-vm-service

name: --enable-asserts
options.description: Enable assert statements

name: --no-enable-asserts
options.description: Do not enable assert statements

name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the compilation

suggestions.name: info
suggestions.description: Show error, warning, and info messages

suggestions.name: warning
suggestions.description: Show only error and warning messages

name: -D
--define
options.description: Define an environment declaration. To specify multiple declarations, use multiple options or use commas to separate key-value pairs. For example: dart compile aot-snapshot -D a=1,b=2 main.dart

args.name: key-value-pairs
args.description: Key-value pairs to define in Dart script

name: --disable-service-auth-codes
options.description: Disables the requirement for an authentication code to communicate with the VM service. Authentication codes help protect against CSRF attacks, so it is not recommended to disable them unless behind a firewall on a secure device

name: --enable-service-port-fallback
options.description: When the VM service is told to bind to a particular port, fallback to 0 if it fails to bind instead of failing to start

name: --namespace
options.description: The path to a directory that dart:io calls will treat as the root of the filesystem

name: --root-certs-file
options.description: The The path to a file containing the trusted root certificates to use for secure socket connections

name: --root-certs-cache
options.description: The path to a cache directory containing the trusted root certificates to use for secure socket connections

name: --trace-loading
options.description: Enables tracing of library and script loading

name: --enable-experiment
options.description: Enable one or more experimental features (see dart.dev/go/experiments

suggestions.name: const-functions
suggestions.description: Allow more of the Dart language to be executed in const expressions

suggestions.name: generic-metadata
suggestions.description: Allow annotations to accept type arguments; also allow generic function types as type arguments

suggestions.name: non-nullable
suggestions.description: Non-nullable by default. (no-op - on by default)

suggestions.name: nonfunction-type-aliases
suggestions.description: Type aliases define a <type>, not just <functionType>. (no-op - enabled by default)
